CIHI_COMPARATORS.description: Days that 90% of patients wait for a CT Scan in Alberta vs the Canadian average (CIHI Wait Times, 2025).
Days that 90% of patients wait for a MRI Scan in Alberta vs the Canadian average (CIHI Wait Times, 2025).
Blended 90th-percentile wait days across cancer surgery types in Alberta vs Canada (CIHI, 2025).
Percentage of radiation therapy patients treated within the 28-day benchmark (CIHI, 2025).

CIHI_COMPARATORS.source: CIHI NACRS / Hospital Beds / ALC Indicators (derived from diagnostic + cancer data)
CIHI_COMPARATORS.verification: Derived from data-diagnostic.json and data-cancer.json populated by CIHI downloaders.

REGIONAL_LGA_DEMAND.source: Open Alberta CKAN LGA community profiles: Table 10.1 (ED visit rates) + Figure 2.2 (population)
REGIONAL_LGA_DEMAND.verification: Derived from data-regional-inequity.json populated by openAlbertaInequityFetcher (Table 10.1 + Figure 2.2).

AHS_WEEKLY_ED_LOS.source: AHS Weekly ED Performance Reports (Edmonton + Calgary PDFs)
AHS_WEEKLY_ED_LOS.sourceVintage: AHS weekly ED LOS PDFs (week ending per report)
AHS_WEEKLY_ED_LOS.verification: Auto-parsed from AHS weekly ED wait/throughput PDFs via pdftotext; facility names normalized to existing hand-authored IDs.

CIHI_OCCUPANCY_RATES.source: CIHI indicator XLSX (878 average acute occupancy rate)
CIHI_OCCUPANCY_RATES.verification: Auto-fetched and parsed from CIHI indicator XLSX data table.

CIHI_ED_WAIT_INITIAL_ASSESSMENT.source: CIHI indicator XLSX (811 ED wait time for physician initial assessment)
CIHI_ED_WAIT_INITIAL_ASSESSMENT.verification: Auto-fetched and parsed from CIHI indicator XLSX data table.

CIHI_OCCUPANCY_RATES.Trend note: Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) no longer exists. Data from Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) will now be attributed to Grande Prairie Regional Hospital (Alta.), Mackenzie Place (Alta.) and Queen Elizabeth II Hospital Ambulatory Care Centre (Alta.) as of December 4, 2021.

CIHI_ED_WAIT_INITIAL_ASSESSMENT.Trend note: Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) no longer exists.
